title: CallBro — AI Notepad, Privately on Your Device
excerpt: CallBro transcribes your calls and turns them into notes and summaries — entirely on your device. Free for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
content_html:
CallBro

Private meeting notes,
powered by your AI.

CallBro transcribes your calls locally.
Codex, Claude Code, or a local LLM creates summaries and action items.

No extra AI
subscription

Free No account required

Fully private, fully yours

Everything stays on your device — your recordings, your notes, and the AI you already pay for, like Claude Code or Codex.

Your recordings, transcripts, and notes are saved as plain files on your device — not the cloud.

Pick the AI behind your summaries — on your device, through Claude Code or Codex, or the cloud.

Transcribing locallyon-device model

Speech-to-text happens right on your device. Your voice never touches the cloud.

How CallBro works across your project calls

Take the call as usual.

No bot, no setup. CallBro captures the call right on your device.

Hang up — the notes are ready.

Summary, decisions, action items. Written for you before you switch tabs.

Next call, it already knows.

CallBro keeps its own memory of the project — what you decided weeks ago is one question away.

You approve. It does the work.

Approved follow-ups go to the tools you already use via MCP — after your yes.

Fits right into how you work

CallBro connects to the tools you use, stays invisible on your calls, and turns transcripts into real work — right from chat.

Connect anything to CallBro with MCP — Slack, Google Calendar, Linear, and more.

4 people on the callrecorded on this device

No bot joins your call — CallBro captures audio at the system level, invisible to everyone else.

Send recap to the team

Create follow-up tasks

Draft the client email

Ask AI chat anything…

Notes, action items, follow-ups — or anything else, just ask in chat.

Ready to stop worrying about meeting notes?

Unlimited meeting notes for free.

content_html_zh:
呼叫兄弟

私人会议记录，由您的人工智能提供支持。

CallBro 在本地转录您的通话。 Codex、Claude Code 或本地法学硕士创建摘要和行动项目。

无需额外的 AI 订阅

免费 无需帐户

完全私人，完全属于您

所有内容都保留在您的设备上 - 您的录音、您的笔记以及您已付费的 AI，例如 Claude Code 或 Codex。

您的录音、文字记录和笔记将以纯文件形式保存在您的设备上，而不是云端。

选择摘要背后的人工智能 - 在您的设备上，通过 Claude Code 或 Codex，或云。

转录本地设备模型

语音转文本直接在您的设备上进行。 你的声音从未触及云端。

CallBro 如何在您的项目调用中工作

像往常一样接听电话。

没有机器人，没有设置。 CallBro 直接在您的设备上捕获呼叫。

挂断电话——笔记已经准备好了。

摘要、决定、行动项目。 在您切换标签之前为您编写。

下次打电话，它已经知道了。

CallBro 保留了自己对该项目的记忆——你几周前的决定离你还有一个问题。

你批准。 它完成工作。

批准的后续行动将转到您已经通过 MCP 使用的工具 - 在您同意之后。

适合您的工作方式

CallBro 连接到您使用的工具，在您的通话中保持隐形，并将记录转化为实际工作 - 直接通过聊天。

使用 MCP 将任何内容连接到 CallBro — Slack、Google Calendar、Linear 等。

此设备上有 4 个人通话录音

没有机器人加入您的通话 — CallBro 在系统级别捕获音频，其他人看不到。

向团队发送摘要

创建后续任务

起草客户电子邮件

向 AI 聊天询问任何事情...

备注、行动项目、后续行动 - 或其他任何内容，只需在聊天中询问即可。

准备好不再担心会议记录了吗？

免费无限量会议记录。
